basic_details.job_title: ARI Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Agharkar Research Institute (ARI) Senior Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 22 July 2026 on the official website https://aripune.org. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ARI Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Relaxation will be applicable for the OBC, SC, ST, etc. categories according to the Government of India regulations.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Microbiology/Biotechnology/Chemical Engineering/Natural/Agricultural Science/MVsc or Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine from a recognized University or equivalent with Four (4) years' experience in R & D, Doctoral Degree in Microbiology/Biotechnology/Chemical Engineering
qualification.details: Master's Degree in Microbiology/Biotechnology/Chemical Engineering/Natural/Agricultural Science/MVsc or Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine from a recognized University or equivalent with Four (4) years' experience in R & D in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and service. OR Doctoral Degree in Microbiology/Biotechnology/Chemical Engineering. Desirable: Preferably Doctoral Degree in Microbiology/Biotechnology/Chemical Engineering, First Class in M.Sc./M. Tech, Bioinformatics analysis of the microbial community, Experience in process optimization for production of biohydrogen/biomethane/bioethanol/ Experience in pretreatment, saccharification and fermentation of biomass. Experience in Aseptic handling of anaerobic bacteria, Research papers in Science Citation Indexed (SCI) journals.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ARI Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ARI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ARI Senior Project Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ARI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ARI Senior Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ARI Senior Project Associate Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Master's Degree in Microbiology/Biotechnology/Chemical Engineering/Natural/Agricultural Science/MVsc or Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine from a recognized University or equivalent with Four (4) years' experience in R & D in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and service. OR Doctoral Degree in Microbiology/Biotechnology/Chemical Engineering. Desirable: Preferably Doctoral Degree in Microbiology/Biotechnology/Chemical Engineering, First Class in M.Sc./M. Tech, Bioinformatics analysis of the microbial community, Experience in process optimization for production of biohydrogen/biomethane/bioethanol/ Experience in pretreatment, saccharification and fermentation of biomass. Experience in Aseptic handling of anaerobic bacteria, Research papers in Science Citation Indexed (SCI) journals.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Relaxation will be applicable for the OBC, SC, ST, etc. categories according to the Government of India regulations.

rows.event: Last Date to Submit the Online Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ARI Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ARI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ARI Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ARI Senior Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the ARI Senior Project Associate position is 05 August 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Microbiology/Biotechnology/Chemical Engineering/Natural/Agricultural Science/MVsc or a Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine with four years of R&D experience, or a Doctoral Degree in the specified fields.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the ARI Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Project Associate post is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 42,000 per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the ARI Senior Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website or the provided application link before the last date. Ensure all details are accurate and documents are uploaded correctly.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 100/- for General and OBC category candidates. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves online application, shortlisting of candidates based on their qualifications and experience, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Agharkar Research Institute (ARI) located?
faq.answer: Agharkar Research Institute (ARI) is located in Pune, Maharashtra, with the pincode 411004.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is ADVT/RecT/JISL/09/SP-392/2026-27.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any specific desirable qualifications for the Senior Project Associate role?
faq.answer: Yes, desirable qualifications include a Doctoral Degree in relevant fields, First Class in M.Sc./M. Tech, experience in bioinformatics analysis, process optimization, biomass fermentation, aseptic handling of anaerobic bacteria, and publications in SCI journals.
